name: pi-sheet-generator
description: LLM-powered PI Sheet Generator for pharmaceutical manufacturing
author: schmeckm

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose exec api npm run db:seed
scripts.docker:seed-graph: docker compose exec api node seeders/seed-graph.js
